events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established with Kyrgyzstan following U.S. recognition of its independence upon dissolution of the Soviet Union, but no mission yet opened.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on December 25, 1991, when President George H.W. Bush announced the decision in an address to the nation regarding the dissolution of the Soviet Union.

events.event_description: The American Embassy in Bishkek was established with Edmund McWilliams as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: The American Embassy in Bishkek was established on February 1, 1992, with Edmund McWilliams as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.
